name: Fairway 54 Idaho Falls
about: Fairway 54 is an indoor golf simulator venue featuring advanced Golfzon technology designed to provide a realistic and immersive golf experience. The facility offers private bays equipped with high-end simulators, adaptive swing plates that replicate real terrain, and auto-teeing systems for seamless gameplay. Membership plans include Par and Birdie tiers, both providing unlimited monthly access with different hourly reservation limits. Corporate packages are also available with weekly hour allocations. The venue caters to golfers seeking a high-tech practice environment with the convenience of 24/7 access.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Golfzon simulation technology for unmatched accuracy
Adaptive swing plate that moves to match uphill, downhill, and sidehill lies
Auto-teeing system eliminates setup time and keeps the game moving
Realistic surface play with hitting mats that replicate actual course conditions

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced simulation technology with floor-moving realism and adaptive swing plate

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify policies on outside food and drink, so it's recommended to inquire directly with the venue.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary based on simulator usage and player pace, but with the auto-teeing system, gameplay is designed to be efficient.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly mention kid-friendly features or policies, so it's best to contact the venue directly for specific information.
